query: SELECT id, name, atoll, featured, displayOrder FROM island_guides WHERE name IN ('Maafushi', 'Thulusdhoo', 'Gulhi', 'Dhiffushi', 'Huraa', 'Himmafushi', 'Guraidhoo', 'Rasdhoo', 'Ukulhas', 'Thoddoo', 'Mathiveri', 'Feridhoo', 'Bodufolhudhoo', 'Dhigurah', 'Dhangethi', 'Maamigili', 'Omadhoo', 'Fulidhoo', 'Thinadhoo', 'Dharavandhoo', 'Fulhadhoo', 'Goidhoo', 'Maalhos', 'Kelaa', 'Utheemu', 'Hanimaadhoo', 'Fuvahmulah', 'Hithadhoo', 'Gan') ORDER BY atoll, name LIMIT 100
